file_contents./home/jsmith/projects/webapp/docker-comp:
version: '3.8'

services:
  api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=development
      - DB_HOST=postgres
      - DB_PORT=5432
      - DB_NAME=webapp_development
      - DB_USER=webapp_dev
      - DB_PASSWORD=W3bApp_D3v#Pg2024!
      - REDIS_URL=redis://:R3d1s_L0cal#Dev@redis:6379/0
      - JWT_SECRET=super_secret_jwt_key_d3v_2024!@#xQ7
      - STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=HONEYPOT_LURE_stripe_test_key_4eC39HqLyjWDarjtT1
      - SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.fK3mN8pR2wXyZ1aB4cD7eG.qH9jL0sT5uV6iO3rE8tY
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - .:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    networks:
      - webapp-net
    restart: unless-stopped

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=webapp_dev
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=W3bApp_D3v#Pg2024!
      - POSTGRES_DB=webapp_development
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U webapp_dev -d webapp_development"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - webapp-net

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    command: redis-server --requirepass R3d1s_L0cal#Dev
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "R3d1s_L0cal#Dev", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - webapp-net

  worker:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.worker
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=development
      - REDIS_URL=redis://:R3d1s_L0cal#Dev@redis:6379/0
      - DB_HOST=postgres
      - DB_USER=webapp_dev
      - DB_PASSWORD=W3bApp_D3v#Pg2024!
      - SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.fK3mN8pR2wXyZ1aB4cD7eG.qH9jL0sT5uV6iO3rE8tY
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - redis
    networks:
      - webapp-net

volumes:
  pgdata:

networks:
  webapp-net:
    driver: bridge
